svg.title: Agentic forex trading bot architecture
svg.desc: External broker, market data and Anthropic API services connect into a layered trading system containing data, intelligence (strategy plus agent), risk gate and execution layers, with a shared observability strip below.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about broker integration choices for the bot')
sendPrompt('What market data and news sources should the bot use?')
sendPrompt('How should I integrate Claude as the agent LLM and what model to use?')
sendPrompt('Detail the data layer: ingestion, TimescaleDB and Redis')
sendPrompt('What goes in the strategy engine module?')
sendPrompt('Explain the agent orchestrator design with Claude and tool use')
sendPrompt('Detail the risk gate module and its checks')
sendPrompt('Detail the execution engine, OMS and broker adapter design')
sendPrompt('Detail the observability and monitoring stack')
